title: REFEREE_STATS_QUERY
description: Query sent to the Referee's Keeper to retrieve the statistical record of that Referee. The Keeper endpoint is obtained from keeper_endpoint in REFEREE_PROFILE. May be sent by any party. Used for reputation evaluation before selecting a Referee.

terminal_id.description: Terminal ID of the Referee to be queried.

requester_id.description: Terminal ID of the party sending this query.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this query was sent.
